description_long: This is a large, curved sectional couch upholstered in a light gray fabric, designed to comfortably seat multiple people. The couch features a continuous, semi-circular backrest with six rectangular back cushions and matching seat cushions, all appearing loose and plush. Two orange-red patterned throws are draped over the seating area, adding a pop of color and texture. The armrests are low, straight, and integrated into the overall form, providing a modern and streamlined appearance. The base of the couch is fully skirted, concealing any legs or support structure from view. This piece would be suitable for communal urban spaces such as lobbies, parks, or outdoor plazas, offering both comfort and visual appeal.
description: A large, curved sectional couch in light gray fabric with loose cushions and two orange-red throws, featuring low, straight armrests and a skirted base.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full curve, six gray cushions, and two orange-red throws draped over the seating.
description_view_1: Opposite front angled view highlighting the continuous backrest, cushion arrangement, and throws from a different perspective.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted skirted back and the top edges of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Back-side view emphasizing the couch's curved form, skirted base, and the throws extending over the backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six loose rectangular back cushions and six matching seat cushions arranged along the curved frame; two orange-red throw blankets draped over the seating area.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is a solid light gray fabric with a subtle woven texture; throw blankets feature a bold orange-red pattern.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are not visible; the base is fully skirted, concealing any support structure.
attribute_armrest_design: Armrests are low, straight, and integrated into the couch's curved form, matching the upholstery and height of the backrest.
attribute_backrest_type: Backrest is continuous and medium-height, with six loose, rectangular cushions providing support along the curve.
